description_long: This is a modern passenger train carriage with a streamlined rectangular body and a metallic gray exterior. The sides feature a continuous row of large, rectangular windows, each bordered by black frames, allowing ample light into the passenger compartment. A bold red and black stripe runs horizontally along the length of the carriage, adding a distinctive visual accent. The undercarriage is equipped with detailed bogies and visible wheel assemblies, while the ends of the carriage have black entry doors and small red lights. The roof is smooth and slightly curved, typical of contemporary intercity or commuter trains. The overall design suggests a focus on passenger comfort and efficient urban or regional transit.
description: A sleek, modern passenger train carriage with a metallic gray body, continuous rectangular windows, and a red and black accent stripe along the sides.
description_view_0: The end view shows the black entry door, small red lights, and the smooth, slightly curved roof.
description_view_1: The side view displays the full length of the carriage, with a continuous row of rectangular windows and a red and black stripe running horizontally.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, showing the black entry door and red lights at the carriage's end.
description_view_3: The opposite side view is identical to the first side, featuring the same window arrangement and accent stripe.
